title: ADEPTNA 3pcs Wicker Plant Basket with Liner – 3 Sizes Seagrass Woven Natural Planter Baskets Home Decorative Plant Pot for Flowers Plants Trees Baskets for Indoor Outdoor Home Decoration
features: VERSATILE PLANT DISPLAY - Elevate your indoor and outdoor greenery with ADEPTNA set of 3 natural seagrass woven planters. Perfect for showcasing your favourite houseplants, succulents, or herbs in a charming, rustic style.

WATERPROOF LINER BASKET – Each our basket has a built-in internal plastic liner, you can use it to plant as a flower pot without worrying about leakage, also great for fake flower decorations. The liners protect your surfaces from water and soil while allowing for easy maintenance.
DURABLE SEAGRASS CONSTRUCTION - These plant baskets are handcrafted with high-quality seagrass, providing durability and sturdiness. They can withstand daily use and are built to last.

THREE SIZES, ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES - This set includes three different sizes (Small 18cm x 15cm), (Medium 23cm x 16cm), and (Large 27cm x 18cm) to accommodate a variety of plants. Mix and match them to create a visually appealing display that adds a touch of nature to your home decor.

STYLISH HOME DÉCOR - The natural look of these woven planters adds a touch of bohemian elegance to any room. They are not only functional but also make beautiful decorative accents in your living room, bedroom, kitchen, or patio.
